title: Add multiple columns to a monday.com board
excerpt: I am creating a board, by uploading an excel spreadsheet. The spreadsheet has 92 columns that I need in the board. I have an enterprise account but my upload only brought in 50 columns. Is there a way to batch add the ot…

posts.author: kwallack1 (Kenneth Wallace)
posts.cookedHtml: I am creating a board, by uploading an excel spreadsheet. The spreadsheet has 92 columns that I need in the board. I have an enterprise account but my upload only brought in 50 columns. Is there a way to batch add the other 42 columns rather than creating them one by one?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kenneth, at this time, there is not a way to batch add columns to an board.

That said, our product team is eager for this kind of feedback to include in their discussions for future improvement. This feedback can be submitted directly to a dedicated section of our community page. Learn more here.

In the meantime, you will need to manually add the relevant columns to the board where your 50 columns were imported. Once those columns are created, you can then import the remaining column data into the board:

Screenshot 2024-08-15 at 3.29.13 PM705×423 27.8 KB
